## Goal

What user problem does this solve?

## Scope

What is included?

## Non-Goals

What is intentionally excluded?

## Security Notes

Does this touch identity, destinations, messages, router integration, logs, contacts, or optional cloud services?

## Validation

What docs, tests, or scripts should change?
